---
title: 'Need Met Faith'
date: '2010-01-26T19:39:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1008058794187895443'
blogger_filename: '/2010/01/need-met-faith.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

01/25/2010<br /><br />Matthew 17<br /><br />Go Cast a hook... take the money and pay the tax for me and you. <br /><br /><br />A need arose. A bill. It was not anticipated by Peter, He hadn't planned for it or thought about it. But it came. Jesus said, yeah pay it! But He didn't fret or fuss. He didn't figure out what He could sell to make it work out. He gave a Word of Knowledge to Peter and met him in the middle of that with Provision. Peter acted and got results. <br /><br />Go to Jesus and let Him give you insight, knowledge, direction, guidance, and provision for every need that arises for you. <br /><br />I always get results when I Come... Hear... Do...<br /><br />Darrell G. Wolfe
